name: Hieroglyph Quest: Pantheon Expanded

configuration.word_draw: draw 2 word cards, keep 1, bottom the other
configuration.word_mulligan: once per player per game, free action: replace your active word (signs return to hand, old word to bottom, draw 2 keep 1); flip your player marker (a coin) when used
configuration.recycle: instead of playing signs, discard any 2 signs and draw 2
configuration.steal: complete opponent word in one continuous play only

english_glosses: place of embalming in imy wt ‘he who is in the p. of e.’
the coiled one ( a serpent spirit)
the damaged eye (of the Sun god)
the wanderer (an epithet of sun god)

great light maker {epithet of Sun god}
